# INTENT

## User Request

Make the public project URL actually show the saved project images in a vertical column layout. Ignore language support for now. If the project is disabled or does not exist, show creative unavailable/not-found messaging that points visitors back to the main offering.

## Requested Outcome

Replace the current demo slug page with a real backend-backed public page that renders uploaded images and handles unavailable states well.

## Constraints

- Ignore language support for this slice.
- Focus on showing saved images only.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
